models.heading: Power Weeder MT900GA-208CC – High Performance Farming Machine
models.subHeading:
A 7 HP power weeder is an agricultural machine commonly used for the practices of tilling, weeding and preparation of soil. It involves rotating blades, which help in penetrating the soil, uprooting the weeding and breaking the compacted soil. The machine either uses a petrol or gasoline engine, which makes them work efficiently in crop lands, vegetable fields, etc. It is generally a lightweight machine designed to be used easily, having adjustable blades, so that farmers can set the depth and width, as some crops may require shallow tilling of soil, while others may need deep tilling. 

 The MT900GA‑208CC is designed to make weeding and soil preparation faster, easier and more efficient for medium and large farms. Its 208 cc engine, robust build, and wide working width make it perfect for vegetable plots, and commercial agriculture. Built with the demand of the Indian Agriculture environment the MT900GA-208CC with solid tyre is an ideal pick for Indian farmers who are looking for strength and increased productivity in daily and challenging field tasks.
features: Motor de gasolina de 4 tiempos de alta eficiencia
Transmisión por correa para mayor durabilidad
Fresas de acero templado para mayor resistencia
featuresEn: 7 HP high performance engine for efficient field operation
Deep tilling capability for better soil aeration
Wide working width for faster soil coverage
Adjustable handlebar for improved comfort and control
Large fuel tank for longer uninterrupted working hours
Oil bath air filter for engine protection

models.heading: Power Weeder MT900GA1-208CC – Efficient & Reliable Agriculture Tool
models.subHeading: A 7 HP power weeder is an agricultural machine commonly used for the practices of tilling, weeding and preparation of soil. They're a good switch from the labour-intensive manual weeding to saving time, enhancing output and yield. The 7 HP denotes the engine power of the machine, which is the horsepower, making it durable enough to handle tough soil conditions while manageable for the farmers to operate fully by themselves.

faqs.question: ¿Qué tipo de combustible utiliza este motocultor?
faqs.questionEn: How many types of Power Weeder models are available?
faqs.answer: Este motocultor utiliza gasolina sin plomo de 87 octanos o superior. El motor es de 4 tiempos, por lo que NO requiere mezcla de aceite con la gasolina.
faqs.answerEn: There are 2 type of power weeder models available which are: MT900GA-208CC - Solid tyre, MT900GA1-208CC - Tube tyre

faqs.question: ¿Cuál es el ancho de trabajo máximo?
faqs.questionEn: Is it suitable for all types of soil?
faqs.answer: El ancho de trabajo es de 36 cm, ideal para trabajos en espacios medianos y huertos familiares.
faqs.answerEn: Yes, it is designed to work in different soil conditions, including hard and uneven land, making it suitable for various farming needs.

faqs.question: ¿Qué mantenimiento requiere?
faqs.questionEn: What is the difference between solid tyres and tube tyres in power weeders?
faqs.answer: Mantenimiento básico incluye: cambio de aceite cada 25 horas de uso, limpieza del filtro de aire, revisión de bujías y lubricación de puntos móviles según manual del usuario.
faqs.answerEn: Solid tyres are puncture-resistant and involve less maintenance, while tube (inflatable) tyres provide better absorption of shock and smoother movement.

faqs.question: ¿Incluye garantía?
faqs.questionEn: Warranty period of Mechnova Power Weeder?
faqs.answer: Sí, incluye garantía de 12 meses por defectos de fabricación. La garantía cubre motor, transmisión y componentes principales.
faqs.answerEn: Mechnova power weeder comes with a warranty of 6 months

faqs.question: ¿Es adecuado para terrenos duros?
faqs.questionEn: Is the Mechnova Power Weeder suitable for small farms?
faqs.answer: Sí, con su motor de 7HP y fresas de acero templado, puede trabajar eficientemente en terrenos compactados y duros.
faqs.answerEn: Yes, Mechnova Power Weeders are specially designed for small to medium-sized farms and are a perfect fit to operate between crop rows and in tough soil conditions.

models.heading: Brush  Cutter  MBC37SC  –  Efficient  4-Stroke  Grass  Cutting Machine
models.subHeading:
The  MBC37SC  is  a  reliable  and  efficient  machine  designed  for  cutting  grass,  light  bushes, and weeds  with  absolute  ease.  It  runs  a  4-stroke  engine,  which  delivers  1.35  HP  power  output, making  it  suitable  for  agricultural  activities.  Unlike  traditional  machines,  this  machine  offers  a 4-stroke  engine,  which  offers  smoother  operation,  less  vibration,  and  better  fuel  efficiency.  This makes it a perfect fit for farmers who want less noise and effort with consistent performance. 

 The  machine  is  well  designed  to  give  better  control  and  reduce  fatigue  during  the  operations.  It has  a  D-shaped  handle  that  provides  a  firm  grip,  which  makes  it  easier  for  the  user  to  guide  the machine  and  control  it  while  working.  The  machine  is  capable  of  handling  regular  usage  without any  wear  and  tear.  As  the  machine  has  a  manual  recoil  start  system,  the  machine  gets  started quickly without any complication.
models.nextSubHeading: Overall,  the  MBC37SC  brush  cutter  is  a  good  option  for  a  routine  grass-cutting  machine.  The machine  is  an  ideal  pick  for  farmers  who  work  on  small  farms  and  for  garden  use,  as  it  provides steady  performance.  If  you  are  looking  for  a  machine  that  is  easy  to  manage  and  delivers consistent results, this brush cutter is a practical and efficient choice.
featuresEn: Comfortable D-shaped handle for better grip and contro
4-stroke engine for smoother and quieter operation
Strong shaft design for stable and steady performance
Compact design for easy handling and movement
Reinforced exhaust for improved durability and life
Easy recoil start system for quick machine startup

models.heading: Backpack Brush Cutter MBC37SBC – Comfortable & Efficient Grass Cutting Machine
models.subHeading: The MBC37SBC Backpack Brush Cutter is especially designed for those users who prefer a balance of both power and comfort while handling regular task work like grass cutting. The machine is suitable for clearing grass, removing weeds, and light vegetation, as it is powered by a 37.7 cc 4-stroke gasoline engine that is able to generate 1.35 HP, making it a powerful choice. One of the biggest advantages of this machine is its backpack style that shifts the weight to the back. This eventually reduces the pressure on the arms of the user and allows for longer working hours, especially in large farms and open areas.
featuresEn: Backpack style design for reduced hand fatigue
4-stroke engine ensures smooth and steady performance
Strong shaft construction for better stability during use
The D-handle provides better balance and control
Reinforced exhaust increases durability and engine life.

faqs.answerEn: In  comparison  to  a  2-stroke  engine,  a  4-stroke  engine  requires  less  maintenance  and  cleaning work.  Its  engine  runs  smoothly  without  any  interruption,  which  is  perfect  for  cutting  grass, weeds, and small plants on farms.

faqs.questionEn: What is the warranty period of the Mechnova Brush Cutter?
faqs.answerEn: The Mechnova Brush Cutter comes with a warranty of 6 months.

faqs.questionEn: Can the machine be used for long working hours comfortably?
faqs.answerEn: Yes,  the  D-handle  design  helps  in  maintaining  a  firm  grip  and  reduces  strain  on  the  hands, making it easier to use for longer durations.

faqs.questionEn: Can the machine cut thick grass?
faqs.answerEn: Yes, it  can  cut  dense  grass  and  light  bushes  effectively,  making  it  suitable  for  regular  field  and garden maintenance.

models.heading: Gasoline  Chainsaw  MCS58A-22SN  –  Powerful  58CC  Wood  Cutting Machine
models.subHeading:
The  MCS58A-22SN  Gasoline  Chainsaw  is  a  powerful  and  reliable  machine  designed  to  work under  heavy  duty  tasks  such  as,  wood  cutting  and  maintenance  tasks.  The  machine  is  equipped with  a  2  stroke  engine,  making  it  eligible  for  delivering  a  strong  output  of  3.2  HP.  It  can  be  used for  cutting  thick  logs  and  branches  with  ease.  Users  can  save  a  lot  of  time  and  effort  because  of its  high  speed  performance  which  ensures  fast  and  smooth  cutting.  A  chainsaw  can  be  used  in gardens, farms, and in professional work making it a versatile machine.  

 This  chainsaw  is  made  for  getting  the  job  done  and  being  easy  to  use.  It  has  an  18-inch  guide bar  and  a  strong  0.325'  chain,  which  helps  you  cut  things  precisely  and,  with  control.  The chainsaw  has  a  fuel  tank  that  holds  550  ml  and  an  oil  tank  that  holds  260  ml  so  you  do  not  have to  stop  and  fill  them  up  all  the  time.  You  have  to  mix  the  fuel  correctly  so  the  engine  runs properly  and  lasts  a  long  time.  The  chainsaw  is  designed  to  fit  in  your  hands,  which  makes  it easier to use for a long time without getting tired.
models.nextSubHeading: The  MCS58A-22SN  Gasoline  Chainsaw  is  a  choice  for  people  who  need  a  powerful  tool  to  cut things.  The  MCS58A-22SN  Gasoline  Chainsaw  has  an  engine  and  a  good  fuel  system,  which makes  it  easy  to  use.  The  Gasoline  Chainsaw  is  great  for  cutting  trees,  getting  firewood  ready and  doing  jobs  around  the  place.  This  makes  it  very  useful,  for  farmers  and  professionals involved in agricultural activities.
featuresEn: Efficient oil system for proper chain lubrication
Easy handling with comfortable and ergonomic design
Strong build quality for long-lasting performance
Powerful 58CC engine for heavy-duty cutting performance
Suitable for farming, gardening, and wood cutting tasks

faqs.questionEn: What is the main use of this chainsaw?
faqs.answerEn: It  is  mainly  used  for  cutting  trees,  trimming  branches,  and  preparing  firewood.  It  is  suitable  for both farming and professional wood cutting tasks.

faqs.questionEn: For how long can it run without refueling?
faqs.answerEn: Having  a  capacity  of  550ml  fuel  tank,  it  can  run  for  a  good  duration  of  time,  depending  on  the usage making it suitable for continuous work.

faqs.questionEn: Is it easy to operate and beginner friendly?
faqs.answerEn: Yes,  it  is  designed  to  make  the  composition  user  friendly  with  a  comfortable  grip,  making  it  easy for users to handle it properly by providing basic guidance as well.
Mechnova Chainsaw comes with a warranty of 6 months.

faqs.questionEn: Can it be used to cut thick wood and bushes?
faqs.answerEn: Yes, equipped with a powerful engine and sharp blades, it can easily cut thick logs and branches.

gasoline-water-pump.nameEn: Gasoline Water Pump: A Reliable Solution for Farm Irrigation
gasoline-water-pump.descriptionEn: Gasoline water pumps for irrigation and drainage

models.metaTitle: GASOLINE WATER PUMP MWP1.5X1.5SA - Mechnova Machines
models.specificationsEn:
Pump type: Self-priming
Maximum power: 4.0 HP, 4-stroke
Starting system: Recoil
Maximum pumping capacity: 15,000 liters per hour
Suction diameter: 1.5 inch
Discharge diameter: 1.5 inch
Total lift: 26 Meters
Suction height: 6 Meters
Fuel tank size: 2 Liters
models.heading: Gasoline Water Pump MWP1.5X1.5SA – Efficient Water Transfer Solution
models.subHeading:
The MWP1.5X1.5SA Gasoline Water Pump is a reliable and compact machine designed for quick and efficient work. It is powered by a strong 4 HP 4-stroke engine, which delivers consistent performance for irrigation, water lifting, and drainage tasks. The machine has a maximum pumping capacity of 15000 liters per hour, which makes it suitable for farms, gardens, and small agriculture setups. It can be easily started by users without much effort, and its self-priming feature ensures easy operation. 

 This water pump is made to be easy to use. It always works the same way. It has an opening to take in water and to send out water so you get a steady flow of water for various agricultural operations. The pump can lift water high up to 26 meters, and it can take in water from 6 meters deep, which is great for getting water from wells, ponds, or tanks. To start the water pump, you just need to pull a rope, and it starts and is equipped with a big enough fuel tank that holds 2 liters of fuel so you can use it for a long time without stopping to refill it. The gasoline pump is built to last so you can use it every day.
models.nextSubHeading: In conclusion, the MWP1.5X1.5SA Gasoline Water Pump is a smart solution for farmers who are looking for a water transfer machine. It offers a good balance of portability, power, and ease of use. With the help of this water pump, farmers can save their time and effort, making their daily schedule tasks more efficient and manageable.
featuresEn: Self-priming pump for quick and easy water operation
Has high pumping capacity up to 15,000 liters per hour
Recoil start system for simple and quick starting
Compact design for easy handling and transport
2-liter fuel tank for longer continuous operation
A 4.0 HP engine delivers strong and reliable performance

models.metaTitle: GASOLINE WATER PUMP MWP3X3SA - Mechnova Machines
models.specificationsEn:
Pump type: Self-priming
Maximum power: 7.0 HP, 4-stroke
Starting system: Recoil
Maximum pumping capacity: 55,000 liters per hour
Suction diameter: 3 inches
Discharge diameter: 3 inches
Total lift: 28 Meters
Suction height: 8 Meters
Fuel tank size: 3.6 Liters
models.heading: Gasoline Water Pump MWP3X3SA – High Capacity Water Pump for Agriculture
models.subHeading:
The MWP3X3SA Gasoline Water Pump is a high capacity machine which has the ability to do heavy duty tasks of water transfer and irrigation needs. As the machine is equipped with a powerful 7 HP 4 - stroke engine, it provides uninterrupted and consistent performance, making it a perfect fit for large farms agricultural operations. It has a massive pumping capacity of up to 55000 liters per hour, this shows that the pump is suitable for handling large volumes of water efficiently. Without any complications users can begin their work quickly. 

 The pump is designed to work for long working hours and in demanding situations. It comes with a 3-inch suction and discharge diameter, which allows a high flow rate for faster water movement. This water pump can easily extract water from deep sources such as canals, wells, and ponds as it has a suction height of 8 meters. The recoil start system ensures easy starting, while the 3.6-liter fuel tank supports extended operation without frequent refueling.
models.nextSubHeading: In conclusion, the MWP3X3SA Gasoline Water Pump is a smart and powerful solution for large scale water management. Farmers who require efficient irrigation and water transfer then this machine proves to be a valuable asset because of its high performance, durable build, and easy operation. Overall productivity and efficiency of the farms improves as the machine saves time and effort.
featuresEn: High-power 7.0 HP engine for heavy-duty performance
Self-priming pump for quick and easy operation
Large pumping capacity up to 55,000 liters per hour
Suction depth up to 8 meters for deep water sources
Recoil start system for simple and quick starting
Strong build for reliable long-term usage

faqs.questionEn: What is the main use of a gasoline water pump?
faqs.answerEn: A water pump is especially designed for transferring water, irrigation purposes, and drainage in farms, gardens, and small agricultural setups.

faqs.questionEn: Can it draw water from deep sources?
faqs.answerEn: Yes, it has a suction height of up to 6 meters, making it a suitable machine to extract water from ponds, tanks, and wells.

faqs.questionEn: What is the warranty period of the Mechnova Gasoline Water Pump?
faqs.answerEn: The Mechnova Gasoline Water Pump comes with a warranty of 6 months.

faqs.questionEn: Does the water pump get started easily and quickly?
faqs.answerEn: Yes, the machine has an easy recoil start system that allows quick and simple starting.

faqs.questionEn: How much water can be pumped by the machine in 1 hour?
faqs.answerEn: The machine can pump up to 15000 liters of water in 1 hour, depending on the working conditions.
